decision.rationale: Classic ASP.NET greenfield application (.NET Framework). Requires Visual Studio — the NuGet Package Manager Console runs Install-Package which auto-configures ApplicationInsights.config, Web.config HTTP modules, and assembly references.

actions.title: Install Application Insights Web SDK via Package Manager Console
Verify ApplicationInsights.config and Web.config were configured
actions.instructions:
After Install-Package completes, verify:
1. ApplicationInsights.config was created in the project root
2. Web.config contains ApplicationInsightsWebTracking and TelemetryHttpModule in <system.webServer><modules>
3. Project references were added for Microsoft.ApplicationInsights and Microsoft.AI.Web assemblies
